name: byte-mcp-server
description: Per-byte USDC data marketplace for AI agents. Publishers slashed on-chain for bad data.
long_description: An MCP server for the Byte Protocol data marketplace on Arbitrum. AI agents can discover data publishers, check on-chain Proof-of-Quality Scores (PQS), subscribe to feeds, monitor subscription health, query slashable fact-oracles, and publish data — all settled per-byte in USDC. The nine read-only tools need no wallet; the five write tools require a private key.

tools.name: byte_search_publishers
tools.description: Search publishers by topic, minimum PQS score, and sort order

tools.name: byte_get_publisher
tools.description: Get detailed on-chain info for a publisher (status, tier, stake, PQS breakdown)

tools.name: byte_get_network_stats
tools.description: Get network-wide stats (total publishers, messages, fees, revenue)

tools.name: byte_check_subscription
tools.description: Check if an address is subscribed to a specific publisher

tools.name: byte_list_my_subscriptions
tools.description: List all publishers a subscriber is currently subscribed to

tools.name: byte_subscription_health
tools.description: Check escrow and allowance health for a subscription pair

tools.name: byte_get_token_balances
tools.description: Get PPB, USDC, and ETH balances for any address

tools.name: byte_list_feeds
tools.description: List all active data feeds with pricing and quality scores

tools.name: byte_query_fact
tools.description: Query a Byte Protocol fact-oracle publisher for a grounded answer with citations

tools.name: byte_drip_faucet
tools.description: Request testnet PPB tokens from the faucet

tools.name: byte_subscribe
tools.description: Subscribe to a publisher's data feed

tools.name: byte_unsubscribe
tools.description: Unsubscribe from a publisher's data feed

tools.name: byte_register_publisher
tools.description: Register as a data publisher (schema, stake, on-chain registration)

tools.name: byte_publish_data
tools.description: Publish data to a subscriber via the DataStream contract

private_key.title: Wallet Private Key
private_key.description: Ethereum private key for write operations (subscribe, publish, faucet). Leave blank for read-only mode.

rpc_url.title: Arbitrum RPC URL
rpc_url.description: Arbitrum Sepolia RPC endpoint. Uses a public default if blank.

indexer_url.title: Indexer API URL
indexer_url.description: Byte Protocol indexer API URL. Uses the hosted default if blank.
